subcodes.first_line: O Thou just Lord! O Thou loving God! We are tender plants in Thy garden, sown by the hand of Thy mercy, our brows inscribed with the traces of Thy love
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ایزد دادگر ای خدای مهر پرور ما نهالان بدستان نوایم بدستت مرحمت
subcodes.subjects: @self-improvement; self-perfection; discipline, @spiritual transformation, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @mystical themes, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
